Operation.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[defName="DankPyon_Alp" or defName="DankPyon_Ghoul_Stage_One" or defName="DankPyon_Ghoul_Stage_Two" or defName="DankPyon_Ghoul_Stage_Three" or @Name="DankPyon_BaseGolem" or defName="DankPyon_RusticMimic" or defName="DankPyon_RoyalMimic" or @Name="DankPyon_SchratBase" or @Name="DankPyon_SchratSaplingBase" or defName="DankPyon_AncientTroll" or defName="DankPyon_Unhold" ]/statBases
